title: 历史反思
subtitle: Historical Reflection, Learning from History, Historical Lessons
assistant_message: Learn to discuss historical reflection, learn from past events, and understand historical lessons.

examples.chinese: 从历史中吸取教训，避免重蹈覆辙。
examples.translation: Draw lessons from history and avoid repeating past mistakes.
examples.translation_id: Ambil pelajaran dari sejarah dan hindari mengulangi kesalahan masa lalu.

examples.chinese: 研究历史不仅是为了了解过去，而且是为了面向未来。
examples.translation: Studying history is not only to understand the past but also to face the future.
examples.translation_id: Mempelajari sejarah tidak hanya untuk memahami masa lalu tetapi juga untuk menghadapi masa depan.

examples.chinese: 正如个人需要反思一样，社会也需要历史反思。
examples.translation: Just as individuals need reflection, society also needs historical reflection.
examples.translation_id: Sama seperti individu membutuhkan refleksi, masyarakat juga membutuhkan refleksi sejarah.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zheng Yi
dialogue.chinese: 从历史中吸取教训，避免重蹈覆辙。你觉得历史对今天有什么启示？
dialogue.pinyin: Cóng lìshǐ zhōng xīqǔ jiàoxùn, bìmiǎn chóngdǎo fùzhé. Nǐ juéde lìshǐ duì jīntiān yǒu shénme qǐshì?
dialogue.translation: Draw lessons from history and avoid repeating past mistakes. What enlightenment do you think history has for today?
dialogue.translation_id: Ambil pelajaran dari sejarah dan hindari mengulangi kesalahan masa lalu. Menurut Anda, pencerahan apa yang dimiliki sejarah untuk hari ini?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Cheng Lin
dialogue.chinese: 研究历史不仅是为了了解过去，而且是为了面向未来。历史经验帮助我们进步。
dialogue.pinyin: Yánjiū lìshǐ bùjǐn shì wèile liǎojiě guòqù, érqiě shì wèile miànxiàng wèilái. Lìshǐ jīngyàn bāngzhù wǒmen jìnbù.
dialogue.translation: Studying history is not only to understand the past but also to face the future. Historical experience helps us progress.
dialogue.translation_id: Mempelajari sejarah tidak hanya untuk memahami masa lalu tetapi juga untuk menghadapi masa depan. Pengalaman sejarah membantu kita maju.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zheng Yi
dialogue.chinese: 如何避免历史错误重复发生？
dialogue.pinyin: Rúhé bìmiǎn lìshǐ cuòwù chóngfù fāshēng?
dialogue.translation: How to prevent historical mistakes from repeating?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Cheng Lin
dialogue.chinese: 正如个人需要反思一样，社会也需要历史反思。从不同视角看问题，才能获得全面启示。
dialogue.pinyin: Zhèngrú gèrén xūyào fǎnsī yīyàng, shèhuì yě xūyào lìshǐ fǎnsī. Cóng bùtóng shìjiǎo kàn wèntí, cáinéng huòdé quánmiàn qǐshì.
dialogue.translation: Just as individuals need reflection, society also needs historical reflection. Only by looking at problems from different perspectives can we gain comprehensive enlightenment.
dialogue.translation_id: Sama seperti individu membutuhkan refleksi, masyarakat juga membutuhkan refleksi sejarah. Hanya dengan melihat masalah dari perspektif yang berbeda kita dapat memperoleh pencerahan yang komprehensif.

exercises.question: How to say 'draw lessons' in Chinese?
Complete: 正如个人需要反思______，社会也需要历史反思。
